## reentrancy-balance
Impact: High
Confidence: Medium
 - [ ] ID-17
Reentrancy in [DegenerusGame._payoutWithEthFallback(address,uint256)](contracts/DegenerusGame.sol#L2054-L2068):
	External call allowing reentrancy:
	- [_transferSteth(to,stSend)](contracts/DegenerusGame.sol#L2059)
		- [! steth.approve(ContractAddresses.SDGNRS,amount)](contracts/DegenerusGame.sol#L2008)
		- [dgnrs.depositSteth(amount)](contracts/DegenerusGame.sol#L2009)
		- [! steth.transfer(to,amount)](contracts/DegenerusGame.sol#L2012)
	Balance read before the call:
	- [stBal = steth.balanceOf(address(this))](contracts/DegenerusGame.sol#L2057)
	Possible stale balance used after the call in a condition:
	- [ethBal < remaining](contracts/DegenerusGame.sol#L2065)
		- stale variable `remaining`

contracts/DegenerusGame.sol#L2054-L2068


 - [ ] ID-18
Reentrancy in [sDGNRS._submitGamblingClaimFrom(address,address,uint256)](contracts/sDGNRS.sol#L1027-L1150):
	External call allowing reentrancy:
	- [coinBacking = coinflip.redeemableFlipBacking()](contracts/sDGNRS.sol#L1082)
	Balance read before the call:
	- [stethBal = steth.balanceOf(address(this))](contracts/sDGNRS.sol#L1072)
	Possible stale balance used after the call in a condition:
	- [claim.ethValueOwed + ethValueOwed > MAX_DAILY_REDEMPTION_EV](contracts/sDGNRS.sol#L1137)
		- stale variable `ethValueOwed`

contracts/sDGNRS.sol#L1027-L1150

## reentrancy-no-eth
Impact: Medium
Confidence: Medium
 - [ ] ID-231
Reentrancy in [DegenerusGameGameOverModule.handleGameOverDrain(uint24)](contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol#L75-L207):
	External calls:
	- [charityGameOver.burnAtGameOver()](contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol#L141)
	- [dgnrs.burnAtGameOver()](contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol#L142)
	- [flip.tombstoneAtGameOver()](contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol#L144)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_goWrite(GO_JACKPOT_PAID_SHIFT,GO_JACKPOT_PAID_MASK,1)](contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol#L146)
		- [gameOverStatePacked = (gameOverStatePacked & ~ (mask << shift)) | ((value & mask) << shift)](contracts/storage/DegenerusGameStorage.sol#L1173)
	[DegenerusGameStorage.gameOverStatePacked](contracts/storage/DegenerusGameStorage.sol#L1156) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [DegenerusGameStorage._goRead(uint256,uint256)](contracts/storage/DegenerusGameStorage.sol#L1167-L1169)
	- [DegenerusGameStorage._goWrite(uint256,uint256,uint256)](contracts/storage/DegenerusGameStorage.sol#L1172-L1174)

contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol#L75-L207


 - [ ] ID-232
Reentrancy in [Coinflip._depositCoinflip(address,address,uint256,bool)](contracts/Coinflip.sol#L272-L345):
	External calls:
	- [mintable = _claimCoinflipsInternal(player,false)](contracts/Coinflip.sol#L286)
		- [jackpots.recordBafFlip(player,bafLvl,winningBafCredit)](contracts/Coinflip.sol#L651)
		- [wwxrp.mintPrize(player,lossCount * COINFLIP_LOSS_WWXRP_REWARD)](contracts/Coinflip.sol#L665)
